rows.label: tev058201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Borabora what he found during his travels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0001
rows.name:
In Nightglow Forest, Borabora found
rare and precious sibercaseras mushroom.
Only one grows every hundred years![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0002
rows.name:
And at cave in Primordial Wilderness,
Borabora obtained seldom-seen item
called "auroran bone."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, and Borabora also come across "spirit
wand," legendary artifact made by ancient
Nopon, near base of mountain in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sadly, none of these able
to cure Henahena...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Borabora have friend and Milly and others
to thank for that. Without friends,
Henahena might never have gotten well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Henahena bounced Borabora to kingdom
come, but Borabora determined to
propose and came right back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Henahena got so very big while
away! Now Henahena look robust
enough to survive any illness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Never again must Borabora wander
great unknown in search of miracle
medicines. It is end of era.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0013
rows.name:
From now on, Borabora stick
right here, make lots of
littlepon, and start proper family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Stars have given blessing to
Borabora and Henahena, and
blessing must not be wasted.[ST:wait ]
